title: Companion — The Lineage of the Red Corner Burst
medium: six ComfyUI photographic plates (RealVisXL V5.0) tracing the lineage of the red diagonal burst across six contexts: a heraldic tabard at Agincourt, a 1950s detergent box, a 1990s supermarket shelf, the 24 HOUR parking sign at Yonge & Carlton, a fire-connection standpipe placard, a peeling SALE window sticker. Same gesture; six audiences.
caption: From a tabard at Agincourt to a parking sign at Yonge & Carlton: the same red diagonal, six contexts, six audiences. The form remains; the war ends; the form is reassigned.
